_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 for LLM Applications (prompt injection, insecure output handling, training data poisoning, model theft, excessive agency).
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-001 (SP, cosine: 0.542), SP-K-011 (SP, cosine: 0.454).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.563). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, vulnerabilities]. DCWF-only terms [application, web] vs WIDAI-only terms [10, agency, applications, data, excessive, handling] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.939, R=0.839). P exceeds R by 0.099 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Knowledge of web application vulnerabilities." and "Knowledge of LLM-specific security vulnerabilities, including the OWASP Top 10 f" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.598 ≈ STS 0.563 (gap 0.035). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, vulnerabilities] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, vulnerabilities]. DCWF-only: [application, web]. WIDAI-only: [10, agency, applications, data, excessive, handling].
